title: UnoReverseTotem
description: Changes the appearance of the totem to an uno card
body:
This mod hilariously replaces Minecraft's Totem of Undying with the UNO Reverse Card!

Now you can tell your friends "UNO Reverse!" when you use a totem.
## Features:

The Totem of Undying image transforms into an UNO Reverse card.

No changes to the game mechanics, just a fun visual change.
## Compatibility
version 1.21.x
